channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Australian Tourist Dies After Falling on Peru’s Inca Trail
item.description: An Australian tourist, 53-year-old Mathew Cameron Patron, tragically died while hiking the Inca Trail to Machu Picchu in Peru. The incident occurred when he reportedly tripped on a wooden bridge and f...

item.title: Abduction of Tundu Lissu's Assistant Raises Political Safety Concerns in Tanzania
item.description: The personal assistant of Tundu Lissu, one of Tanzania's most prominent opposition politicians, has been abducted in Dar es Salaam, the country's largest city. This incident has sparked worry among po...

item.title: Marathi Film ‘Tumbadchi Manjula’ Trailer Released Featuring a Ghostly Twist
item.description: The trailer for the upcoming Marathi film ‘Tumbadchi Manjula’ has been released, generating interest among regional cinema enthusiasts. Directed by Vividh Korgaonkar, the film is a remake of the popul...

item.title: Mascot Kalu Pulls Out of APC Governorship Primary in Abia, Citing Zoning and Fairness
item.description: Mascot Kalu, wey be younger brother to former Abia State Governor Orji Kalu, don officially withdraw himself from the All Progressives Congress (APC) governorship primary for 2027 elections. He announ...

item.title: The Bosman Ruling and its Lasting Impact on European Soccer
item.description: Jean-Marc Bosman, a relatively obscure Belgian footballer, changed the landscape of European soccer through the landmark 1995 Bosman Ruling by the European Court of Justice. Prior to this, players wer...

item.title: Guide to Finding Celestine in Subnautica 2
item.description: Subnautica 2 has captured the attention of gaming enthusiasts since its launch, quickly becoming a popular underwater survival adventure. One resource players frequently seek is Celestine, a striking ...

item.title: Africa's Potential to Lead Global Renewal and Unity
item.description: Africa remains a continent of profound contradictions, where challenges such as conflict and poverty coexist with innovation and resilience. Max Boqwana reflects on Bantu Steve Biko's vision that Afri...

item.title: Learn the Word of the Day: 'Puksaan' and Its Meaning
item.description: ABS-CBN Lifestyle features a 'Word of the Day' for May 22, 2026, introducing the Filipino word 'puksaan.' The initiative aims to enrich the Filipino language and culture by sharing daily words, encour...

item.title: NBI to carry out ICC-issued arrest warrant on Ronald ‘Bato’ Dela Rosa
item.description: The National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) in the Philippines has confirmed that it will enforce the arrest warrant issued by the International Criminal Court (ICC) against former police chief Ronald ...

item.title: The Enduring Creative and Personal Partnership of Fellini and Masina
item.description: Federico Fellini and Giulietta Masina shared more than a celebrated marriage; they formed one of cinema’s most iconic director-muse partnerships. Married for fifty years, their relationship blended pe...

item.title: GWM P300: A Solid Alternative in South Africa's Pickup Market
item.description: The GWM P300 has established itself as a strong contender in South Africa’s competitive bakkie segment, ranking fourth behind the Toyota Hilux, Ford Ranger, and Isuzu D-Max. Launched in 2020, the P-Se...

item.title: James Murdoch invests US$300 million in Vox Media, signalling shift from family media legacy
item.description: James Murdoch, younger son of media mogul Rupert Murdoch, is making a bold move in the media landscape with a reported US$300 million investment in Vox Media. This acquisition includes notable propert...

item.title: UK Households Advised to Check Train Services Ahead of May Bank Holiday
item.description: UK residents have been advised to check train services before the May Bank Holiday weekend due to planned industrial action and engineering works that will affect several railway lines. National Rail ...

item.title: PNP Announces Reassignment of Seven Senior Officers
item.description: The Philippine National Police (PNP) has implemented a new round of personnel reassignments affecting several senior officials and police generals. As per National Headquarters Special Order No. URA-2...

item.title: Practical Guidance for Effective Asthma Assessment and Management
item.description: Asthma affects over 260 million people globally, yet many manage it only when symptoms appear. Frequent wheezing, nighttime breathing difficulties, or overuse of reliever inhalers are warning signs th...

item.title: Manipur Security Forces Confiscate Large Weapons Cache and Arrest Four UNLF(P) Insurgents
item.description: In Manipur, the security forces carried out a major operation in the Lamdeng area of Imphal, resulting in the seizure of a significant cache of arms and ammunition and the arrest of four members of th...

item.title: Kyle Busch, Legendary NASCAR Driver, Passes Away at 41
item.description: Kyle Busch, a highly accomplished NASCAR driver and two-time Cup Series champion, has passed away at the age of 41. Recognized as one of the most successful drivers across NASCAR’s three national seri...

item.title: NEDC Inspects Ongoing Adamawa Bridge and Youth Development Centre Projects
item.description: The North East Development Commission (NEDC) don show serious appreciation for the work wey dey go on for the five-span bridge at Bole and the Youth Development Centre for Shagari Lelewalji, Yola Sout...

item.title: Pedro Pascal discusses the personal significance of his band t-shirts
